channel.title: Kengo's Daily Brief
channel.description: 論文・記事を毎日ダイジェスト音声でインプットするための自分専用ポッドキャスト（自動生成）。
channel.itunes:author: Kengo Nishikawa
channel.itunes:summary: 論文・記事を毎日ダイジェスト音声でインプットするための自分専用ポッドキャスト（自動生成）。

item.title: デイリーブリーフ 2026-06-24
item.description:
腸活の科学は相関から仕組みへ進み、腸内細菌が脳のエネルギー代謝を変えて気分に関わること、善玉菌や食物繊維が腸のバリア機能を支えること、そして土台となる酪酸を作れている人がごく少数であることが示された。資金面では腸内細菌を医薬品として育てる動きがドイツにも広がり、米国では大手による腸活ブランド買収が相次ぎ、女性の健康と細菌叢が次のフロンティアとして注目される。あわせてAIによるレアアース不要磁石の設計ロードマップ、抹茶の偽物・産地偽装の問題、プライムデー期のAmazon Rufus最適化とクリック単価高騰を取り上げた。
Sources: - Gut microbiota reshapes host energy metabolism to modulate depressive behaviors (Gut Microbes, Apr 2026): https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC13108357/ - The gut microbiota alleviates depression by remodeling gut-brain energy metabolism (Cell Metabolism, 2026): https://www.cell.com/cell-metabolism/abstract/S1550-4131(26)00096-3 - Reinforcing gut integrity: meta-analysis of probiotics, synbiotics, and prebiotics on intestinal permeability markers (Pharmacological Research, Jun 2025): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40378939/ - Butyrate in microbiome abates a host of ills, studies find (UW Medicine Newsroom): https://newsroom.uw.edu/blog/butyrate-microbiome-abates-host-ills-studies-find - Investigating the response of the butyrate production potential to major fibers in dietary intervention studies (npj Biofilms and Microbiomes): https://www.nature.com/articles/s41522-024-00533-5 - Germany's mbiomics brings Series A to €30 million to scale microbiome therapeutics for chronic diseases (EU-Startups, Apr 2026): https://www.eu-startups.com/2026/04/germanys-mbiomics-brings-series-a-to-e30-million-to-scale-microbiome-therapeutics-for-chronic-diseases/ - How Startup Seed Health Became Target's Fastest Growing Probiotics Brand (US Chamber of Commerce): https://www.uschamber.com/co/good-company/the-leap/seed-health-startup-growth - Freya Biosciences raises $38M in a major Series A to advance women's reproductive immunotherapies (ArcticStartup): https://arcticstartup.com/freya-biosciences-raises-38m-series-a/ - Ames Lab scientist provides AI-driven roadmap for future permanent magnet design (TechXplore, Jun 2026): https://techxplore.com/news/2026-06-ai-driven-roadmap-future-permanent.html - AI Finds a Rare-Earth-Free Magnet? Not So Fast (Rare Earth Exchanges): https://rareearthexchanges.com/news/ai-finds-a-rare-earth-free-magnet-not-so-fast/ - 10 AI Research Breakthroughs That Matter for Builders, June 2026 (Build This Now): https://www.buildthisnow.com/blog/guide/mechanics/ai-research-june-2026 - Uji Matcha Wholesale 2026: Sourcing, Pricing & Verification After the Kyoto Shortage (First Agri B2B): https://first-agri.jp/matcha/columns/054 - Amazon Seller News June 2026 - FBA Updates / Rufus discovery & AI listing tools (Nova Analytics): https://novadata.io/resources/news - Amazon Prime Day 2026 Dates: June 23 to 26, Seller Guide (SellerApp): https://www.sellerapp.com/blog/amazon-prime-day/

item.title: Daily Brief 2026-06-24 (English)
item.description:
腸活の科学は相関から仕組みへ進み、腸内細菌が脳のエネルギー代謝を変えて気分に関わること、善玉菌や食物繊維が腸のバリア機能を支えること、そして土台となる酪酸を作れている人がごく少数であることが示された。資金面では腸内細菌を医薬品として育てる動きがドイツにも広がり、米国では大手による腸活ブランド買収が相次ぎ、女性の健康と細菌叢が次のフロンティアとして注目される。あわせてAIによるレアアース不要磁石の設計ロードマップ、抹茶の偽物・産地偽装の問題、プライムデー期のAmazon Rufus最適化とクリック単価高騰を取り上げた。
Sources: - Gut microbiota reshapes host energy metabolism to modulate depressive behaviors (Gut Microbes, Apr 2026): https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC13108357/ - The gut microbiota alleviates depression by remodeling gut-brain energy metabolism (Cell Metabolism, 2026): https://www.cell.com/cell-metabolism/abstract/S1550-4131(26)00096-3 - Reinforcing gut integrity: meta-analysis of probiotics, synbiotics, and prebiotics on intestinal permeability markers (Pharmacological Research, Jun 2025): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40378939/ - Butyrate in microbiome abates a host of ills, studies find (UW Medicine Newsroom): https://newsroom.uw.edu/blog/butyrate-microbiome-abates-host-ills-studies-find - Investigating the response of the butyrate production potential to major fibers in dietary intervention studies (npj Biofilms and Microbiomes): https://www.nature.com/articles/s41522-024-00533-5 - Germany's mbiomics brings Series A to €30 million to scale microbiome therapeutics for chronic diseases (EU-Startups, Apr 2026): https://www.eu-startups.com/2026/04/germanys-mbiomics-brings-series-a-to-e30-million-to-scale-microbiome-therapeutics-for-chronic-diseases/ - How Startup Seed Health Became Target's Fastest Growing Probiotics Brand (US Chamber of Commerce): https://www.uschamber.com/co/good-company/the-leap/seed-health-startup-growth - Freya Biosciences raises $38M in a major Series A to advance women's reproductive immunotherapies (ArcticStartup): https://arcticstartup.com/freya-biosciences-raises-38m-series-a/ - Ames Lab scientist provides AI-driven roadmap for future permanent magnet design (TechXplore, Jun 2026): https://techxplore.com/news/2026-06-ai-driven-roadmap-future-permanent.html - AI Finds a Rare-Earth-Free Magnet? Not So Fast (Rare Earth Exchanges): https://rareearthexchanges.com/news/ai-finds-a-rare-earth-free-magnet-not-so-fast/ - 10 AI Research Breakthroughs That Matter for Builders, June 2026 (Build This Now): https://www.buildthisnow.com/blog/guide/mechanics/ai-research-june-2026 - Uji Matcha Wholesale 2026: Sourcing, Pricing & Verification After the Kyoto Shortage (First Agri B2B): https://first-agri.jp/matcha/columns/054 - Amazon Seller News June 2026 - FBA Updates / Rufus discovery & AI listing tools (Nova Analytics): https://novadata.io/resources/news - Amazon Prime Day 2026 Dates: June 23 to 26, Seller Guide (SellerApp): https://www.sellerapp.com/blog/amazon-prime-day/

item.title: デイリーブリーフ 特別編：ONE畠中理弥のGTM戦略 2026-06-24
item.description:
日本のスタートアップONE株式会社と創業者・畠中理弥のGTM戦略を一次情報中心に深掘りした特別回。実態は「打席数を増やす思想×主力は1本に集中→畳んで次」の逐次集中型で、当たったBeMatchを内製チームの縦型ショート量産（数百アカウント・累計10億再生・広告費ほぼゼロ）でApp Store上位に押し上げた。資金はVCエクイティ前提だが、BeMatchはBeReal側の権利侵害申立てでAppleにBANされ売上ゼロに陥り、模倣＋単一プラットフォーム依存の脆さも露呈。信頼・継続が命のヘルスケア領域への「全振り」転用は不可で、獲得エンジンと検証思想だけ切り出すのが現実的という結論。
Sources: - 本人note「2024年総括」(さとぽん): https://note.com/satoyahatanaka/n/na3c3c7efb9ce - 本人note「2025年総括」(さとぽん): https://note.com/satoyahatanaka/n/n4882e1758191 - 本人note(プロフィール/思想): https://note.com/satoyahatanaka/n/n49b221f01efb - 本人note(NFT期/売却): https://note.com/satoyahatanaka/n/n40567232e567 - PR TIMES ONE株式会社 2億円資金調達リリース: https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000010.000101105.html - PR TIMES ONE株式会社(設立/BeMatch一周忌): https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000014.000101105.html - テレ東プラス NewMatchオウンドメディア総再生10億回: https://www.tv-tokyo.co.jp/plus/external-pr/entry/26286.html - BRIDGE プレシリーズA 2億円調達: https://thebridge.jp/2024/07/one-pre-series-a-round-funding - GMO公式 ONE設立背景: https://www.gmo.jp/news/article/8011/ - Wantedly 畠中理弥プロフィール: https://www.wantedly.com/id/hatanakasatoya - アプリマーケティング研究所 BeMatch成長: https://appmarketinglabo.net/bematch-growth - TikTok広告ポリシー(ヘルスケア): https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/tiktok-ads-policy-healthcare-pharmaceuticals?lang=ja

item.title: Daily Brief Special: ONE畠中理弥のGTM戦略 2026-06-24 (English)
item.description:
日本のスタートアップONE株式会社と創業者・畠中理弥のGTM戦略を一次情報中心に深掘りした特別回。実態は「打席数を増やす思想×主力は1本に集中→畳んで次」の逐次集中型で、当たったBeMatchを内製チームの縦型ショート量産（数百アカウント・累計10億再生・広告費ほぼゼロ）でApp Store上位に押し上げた。資金はVCエクイティ前提だが、BeMatchはBeReal側の権利侵害申立てでAppleにBANされ売上ゼロに陥り、模倣＋単一プラットフォーム依存の脆さも露呈。信頼・継続が命のヘルスケア領域への「全振り」転用は不可で、獲得エンジンと検証思想だけ切り出すのが現実的という結論。
Sources: - 本人note「2024年総括」(さとぽん): https://note.com/satoyahatanaka/n/na3c3c7efb9ce - 本人note「2025年総括」(さとぽん): https://note.com/satoyahatanaka/n/n4882e1758191 - 本人note(プロフィール/思想): https://note.com/satoyahatanaka/n/n49b221f01efb - 本人note(NFT期/売却): https://note.com/satoyahatanaka/n/n40567232e567 - PR TIMES ONE株式会社 2億円資金調達リリース: https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000010.000101105.html - PR TIMES ONE株式会社(設立/BeMatch一周忌): https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000014.000101105.html - テレ東プラス NewMatchオウンドメディア総再生10億回: https://www.tv-tokyo.co.jp/plus/external-pr/entry/26286.html - BRIDGE プレシリーズA 2億円調達: https://thebridge.jp/2024/07/one-pre-series-a-round-funding - GMO公式 ONE設立背景: https://www.gmo.jp/news/article/8011/ - Wantedly 畠中理弥プロフィール: https://www.wantedly.com/id/hatanakasatoya - アプリマーケティング研究所 BeMatch成長: https://appmarketinglabo.net/bematch-growth - TikTok広告ポリシー(ヘルスケア): https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/tiktok-ads-policy-healthcare-pharmaceuticals?lang=ja

item.title: デイリーブリーフ 2026-06-23
item.description:
腸活の科学は便通から気分・睡眠へ広がり、効き目はその人の食事や腸内細菌との相性に左右されるという個別化の視点が強まっている。資金面では、日本で腸内細菌叢移植を医薬品として開発する動きに事業会社の資金が入り、米国では「毎週菌を変える」消費者向け設計や、痩せ薬ジーエルピーワンの相棒という隣接市場が広がる。あわせてAIが80年来の数学難問を解いた話、抹茶原料の記録的高値、アマゾンのAI会話広告が課金対象になった件を取り上げた。
Sources: - Distinct Gut Microbiome Characteristics Associated with Mental Health Symptoms of Healthy Adults (Brain Sciences 2026): https://www.mdpi.com/2076-3425/16/4/382 - Fiber intake could change how prebiotics work, new study suggests (NutraIngredients, on Frontiers in Nutrition 2026): https://www.nutraingredients.com/Article/2026/05/21/fiber-intake-could-change-how-prebiotics-work-new-study-suggests/ - The polyphenols in these common teas improve your microbiome and metabolism (on J. Microbiology and Biotechnology, May 29 2026): https://longevity.news/2026-05-29-the-polyphenols-in-these-common-teas-improve-your-microbiome-and-metabolism.html - 'Hidden' bugs in our gut appear key to good health, finds global study (University of Cambridge): https://www.cam.ac.uk/research/news/hidden-bugs-in-our-gut-appear-key-to-good-health-finds-global-study - Meta-analysis of the uncultured gut microbiome across 11,115 global metagenomes reveals a candidate signature of health (Cell Host & Microbe): https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1931312826000387 - 腸内細菌叢移植のメタジェンセラピューティクス、シリーズB総額35億2,000万円調達 (THE BRIDGE): https://thebridge.jp/2026/02/metagentherapeutics-raises-35-billion-yen-series-b - メタジェンセラ、11.9億円調達「便移植」治療の開発進める (日本経済新聞): https://www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQOUC192750Z10C26A2000000/ - Gut Health Startup Good Bacteria Raises $3.2M (Beauty Independent): https://www.beautyindependent.com/gut-health-startup-good-bacteria-raises-3-2m-probiotic-supplement-business/ - GLP-1 companion supplements and post-medication nutrition tap metabolic health demand (Nutrition Insight, Jun 12 2026): https://www.nutritioninsight.com/news/glp1-companion-products-metabolic-health-innovations.html - OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time (TechCrunch): https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/20/openai-claims-it-solved-an-80-year-old-math-problem-for-real-this-time/ - An AI solution to an 80-year-old problem has shocked mathematicians (The Conversation): https://theconversation.com/an-ai-solution-to-an-80-year-old-problem-has-shocked-mathematicians-283686 - Building a hill-climbing machine: Launching seven new MAI models (Microsoft AI): https://microsoft.ai/news/building-a-hillclimbing-machine-launching-seven-new-mai-models/ - Microsoft unveils new AI models to lessen reliance on OpenAI and lower costs for developers (CNBC): https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/02/microsoft-unveils-new-ai-models-lessen-reliance-on-openai-lower-costs.html - Kagoshima Ichibancha Prices Double in 2026: Japan Matcha Supply Update: https://www.matcha-wholesale-japan.com/blogs/news/kagoshima-ichibancha-prices-double-in-2026-japan-matcha-supply-update - Matcha Trends and Statistics in 2026 (Tastewise): https://tastewise.io/blog/matcha-trends - Amazon's AI shopping prompts are now billable: what changed on March 25 (PPC Land): https://ppc.land/amazons-ai-shopping-prompts-are-now-billable-what-changed-on-march-25/ - When is Amazon Prime Day 2026? June 23-26 (About Amazon): https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/retail/amazon-prime-day-2026-date

item.title: Daily Brief 2026-06-23 (English)
item.description:
腸活の科学は便通から気分・睡眠へ広がり、効き目はその人の食事や腸内細菌との相性に左右されるという個別化の視点が強まっている。資金面では、日本で腸内細菌叢移植を医薬品として開発する動きに事業会社の資金が入り、米国では「毎週菌を変える」消費者向け設計や、痩せ薬ジーエルピーワンの相棒という隣接市場が広がる。あわせてAIが80年来の数学難問を解いた話、抹茶原料の記録的高値、アマゾンのAI会話広告が課金対象になった件を取り上げた。
Sources: - Distinct Gut Microbiome Characteristics Associated with Mental Health Symptoms of Healthy Adults (Brain Sciences 2026): https://www.mdpi.com/2076-3425/16/4/382 - Fiber intake could change how prebiotics work, new study suggests (NutraIngredients, on Frontiers in Nutrition 2026): https://www.nutraingredients.com/Article/2026/05/21/fiber-intake-could-change-how-prebiotics-work-new-study-suggests/ - The polyphenols in these common teas improve your microbiome and metabolism (on J. Microbiology and Biotechnology, May 29 2026): https://longevity.news/2026-05-29-the-polyphenols-in-these-common-teas-improve-your-microbiome-and-metabolism.html - 'Hidden' bugs in our gut appear key to good health, finds global study (University of Cambridge): https://www.cam.ac.uk/research/news/hidden-bugs-in-our-gut-appear-key-to-good-health-finds-global-study - Meta-analysis of the uncultured gut microbiome across 11,115 global metagenomes reveals a candidate signature of health (Cell Host & Microbe): https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1931312826000387 - 腸内細菌叢移植のメタジェンセラピューティクス、シリーズB総額35億2,000万円調達 (THE BRIDGE): https://thebridge.jp/2026/02/metagentherapeutics-raises-35-billion-yen-series-b - メタジェンセラ、11.9億円調達「便移植」治療の開発進める (日本経済新聞): https://www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQOUC192750Z10C26A2000000/ - Gut Health Startup Good Bacteria Raises $3.2M (Beauty Independent): https://www.beautyindependent.com/gut-health-startup-good-bacteria-raises-3-2m-probiotic-supplement-business/ - GLP-1 companion supplements and post-medication nutrition tap metabolic health demand (Nutrition Insight, Jun 12 2026): https://www.nutritioninsight.com/news/glp1-companion-products-metabolic-health-innovations.html - OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time (TechCrunch): https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/20/openai-claims-it-solved-an-80-year-old-math-problem-for-real-this-time/ - An AI solution to an 80-year-old problem has shocked mathematicians (The Conversation): https://theconversation.com/an-ai-solution-to-an-80-year-old-problem-has-shocked-mathematicians-283686 - Building a hill-climbing machine: Launching seven new MAI models (Microsoft AI): https://microsoft.ai/news/building-a-hillclimbing-machine-launching-seven-new-mai-models/ - Microsoft unveils new AI models to lessen reliance on OpenAI and lower costs for developers (CNBC): https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/02/microsoft-unveils-new-ai-models-lessen-reliance-on-openai-lower-costs.html - Kagoshima Ichibancha Prices Double in 2026: Japan Matcha Supply Update: https://www.matcha-wholesale-japan.com/blogs/news/kagoshima-ichibancha-prices-double-in-2026-japan-matcha-supply-update - Matcha Trends and Statistics in 2026 (Tastewise): https://tastewise.io/blog/matcha-trends - Amazon's AI shopping prompts are now billable: what changed on March 25 (PPC Land): https://ppc.land/amazons-ai-shopping-prompts-are-now-billable-what-changed-on-march-25/ - When is Amazon Prime Day 2026? June 23-26 (About Amazon): https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/retail/amazon-prime-day-2026-date

item.title: デイリーブリーフ 2026-06-22
item.description:
腸活の科学は便通から気分・睡眠・腸脳相関へ広がり、2026年の鍵は個別化・科学的証拠・多機能の三つ。米国ではデジタルヘルスへ再び資金が戻り、腸活はスタートアップから巨大食品メーカーまでの激戦区で、AIと微生物を掛けた個別化が未来の先行指標となっている。あわせてAIモデル競争の新段階、抹茶の品薄継続、アマゾン広告の単価上昇と意図ベース化を取り上げた。
Sources: - Empirical evidence of the neuroactive potential of the gut on neurochemistry in the gut-brain axis in humans (bioRxiv): https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.05.07.652653.full.pdf - Gut microbiota in irritable bowel syndrome: mechanisms and microbiome-based therapies (PMC): https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12631637/ - Bifidobacterium supplementation maintains gut microbiota stability during short-term travel (Frontiers in Nutrition 2026): https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/nutrition/articles/10.3389/fnut.2026.1724829/full - Probiotic for Gut Health, Recruiting Participants for Clinical Trial 2026 (Power): https://www.withpower.com/trial/phase-2026-6be83 - 2026 gut health essentials: Personalization, evidence and multi-benefit claims (Nutrition Insight): https://www.nutritioninsight.com/news/gut-health-trends-2026-biotics-personalized-nutrition.html - Digital health startups raked in $4B in Q1 2026 (Fierce Healthcare / Rock Health): https://www.fiercehealthcare.com/digital-health/digital-health-startups-raked-4b-q1-12-megadeals-driving-investment-rock-health - Gut Health Startup Good Bacteria Raises $3.2M (Beauty Independent): https://www.beautyindependent.com/gut-health-startup-good-bacteria-raises-3-2m-probiotic-supplement-business/ - Anto, foundation model for gut microbiomes (Y Combinator): https://www.ycombinator.com/companies/anto - AI-powered biotech startup Gutgutgoose accepted into Y Combinator (Business News Australia): https://www.businessnewsaustralia.com/articles/ai-powered-biotech-startup-gutgutgoose-accepted-into-silicon-valleys-y-combinator.html - LLM News Today June 2026, AI Model Releases (LLM-Stats): https://llm-stats.com/ai-news - Top AI News for June 2026: Breakthroughs, Launches and Trends (AIapps): https://www.aiapps.com/blog/ai-news-breakthroughs-launches-trends-must-read/ - Matcha Shortage 2026: A Founder Explains What's Happening (One with Tea): https://onewithtea.com/blogs/news/2026-matcha-shortage-explained - Japan's Matcha Crisis: 170% Price Surge (Vision Times): https://www.visiontimes.com/2026/02/12/japans-matcha-crisis-how-a-170-price-surge-exposed-the-fragility-of-a-centuries-old-industry.html - Amazon Sponsored Products CPC hits record high before Prime Day (Nova Analytics): https://novadata.io/resources/news/amazon-sponsored-products-cpc-record-high-june-2026 - Amazon's 2026 Algorithm Update and COSMO (Algofy): https://www.algofy.com/post/amazons-2026-algorithm-update-what-changed-and-how-to-adapt-your-strategy-now

item.title: Daily Brief 2026-06-22 (English)
item.description:
腸活の科学は便通から気分・睡眠・腸脳相関へ広がり、2026年の鍵は個別化・科学的証拠・多機能の三つ。米国ではデジタルヘルスへ再び資金が戻り、腸活はスタートアップから巨大食品メーカーまでの激戦区で、AIと微生物を掛けた個別化が未来の先行指標となっている。あわせてAIモデル競争の新段階、抹茶の品薄継続、アマゾン広告の単価上昇と意図ベース化を取り上げた。
Sources: - Empirical evidence of the neuroactive potential of the gut on neurochemistry in the gut-brain axis in humans (bioRxiv): https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.05.07.652653.full.pdf - Gut microbiota in irritable bowel syndrome: mechanisms and microbiome-based therapies (PMC): https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12631637/ - Bifidobacterium supplementation maintains gut microbiota stability during short-term travel (Frontiers in Nutrition 2026): https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/nutrition/articles/10.3389/fnut.2026.1724829/full - Probiotic for Gut Health, Recruiting Participants for Clinical Trial 2026 (Power): https://www.withpower.com/trial/phase-2026-6be83 - 2026 gut health essentials: Personalization, evidence and multi-benefit claims (Nutrition Insight): https://www.nutritioninsight.com/news/gut-health-trends-2026-biotics-personalized-nutrition.html - Digital health startups raked in $4B in Q1 2026 (Fierce Healthcare / Rock Health): https://www.fiercehealthcare.com/digital-health/digital-health-startups-raked-4b-q1-12-megadeals-driving-investment-rock-health - Gut Health Startup Good Bacteria Raises $3.2M (Beauty Independent): https://www.beautyindependent.com/gut-health-startup-good-bacteria-raises-3-2m-probiotic-supplement-business/ - Anto, foundation model for gut microbiomes (Y Combinator): https://www.ycombinator.com/companies/anto - AI-powered biotech startup Gutgutgoose accepted into Y Combinator (Business News Australia): https://www.businessnewsaustralia.com/articles/ai-powered-biotech-startup-gutgutgoose-accepted-into-silicon-valleys-y-combinator.html - LLM News Today June 2026, AI Model Releases (LLM-Stats): https://llm-stats.com/ai-news - Top AI News for June 2026: Breakthroughs, Launches and Trends (AIapps): https://www.aiapps.com/blog/ai-news-breakthroughs-launches-trends-must-read/ - Matcha Shortage 2026: A Founder Explains What's Happening (One with Tea): https://onewithtea.com/blogs/news/2026-matcha-shortage-explained - Japan's Matcha Crisis: 170% Price Surge (Vision Times): https://www.visiontimes.com/2026/02/12/japans-matcha-crisis-how-a-170-price-surge-exposed-the-fragility-of-a-centuries-old-industry.html - Amazon Sponsored Products CPC hits record high before Prime Day (Nova Analytics): https://novadata.io/resources/news/amazon-sponsored-products-cpc-record-high-june-2026 - Amazon's 2026 Algorithm Update and COSMO (Algofy): https://www.algofy.com/post/amazons-2026-algorithm-update-what-changed-and-how-to-adapt-your-strategy-now

item.title: デイリーブリーフ 特別編：日米ウェルネス比較 2026-06-22
item.description:
特別編。アメリカと日本のウェルネス産業を、市場規模・規制・消費者トレンド・トレンドの時差・構造差の5角度で比較。結論は「全く別物ではなく、規制の骨格はむしろ酷似。違いを生むのは国民皆保険という土台で、似ているが制度差と時差を内包した市場」。米ウェルネス全体は約2.1兆ドルで日本の関連市場とは一桁差、規制は日米とも非事前審査の届出制で同型、皆保険がセルフケア市場を抑制、Wegovyの例が時差と抑制の二面性を示す。「日本は数年遅れで米国を後追い」仮説は反証され、チャネルは日米で逆走（米EC伸長／日本店頭回帰）。
Sources: - Global Wellness Institute（米ウェルネス2.1兆ドル）: https://globalwellnessinstitute.org/press-room/press-releases/us-wellness-economy-surges-to-2-1-trillion-cementing-global-leadership/ - Nutraceuticals World / NBJ（米サプリ693億ドル・EC23.2%）: https://www.nutraceuticalsworld.com/exclusives/the-state-of-supplements-u-s-market-approaches-70-billion/ - 矢野経済研究所（日本健康食品市場・チャネル）: https://www.yano.co.jp/press-release/show/press_id/3760 - 富士経済（機能性表示食品7,274億円）: https://www.fuji-keizai.co.jp/press/detail.html?cid=25021 - FDA 構造機能表示（21 CFR 101.93）: https://www.fda.gov/food/nutrition-food-labeling-and-critical-foods/structurefunction-claims - 消費者庁 機能性表示食品: https://www.caa.go.jp/policies/policy/food_labeling/foods_with_function_claims - 日米制度比較（査読 PMC9866933）: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC9866933/ - 皆保険とセルフメディケーション（ニッセイ基礎研）: https://www.nli-research.co.jp/files/topics/35600_ext_18_0.pdf - 受診行動（査読 PMC3523005）: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3523005/ - Wegovy日米比較（Diabetes Obes Metab, Hakariya 2024）: https://dom-pubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/dom.15638

item.title: Daily Brief Special: US vs Japan Wellness 2026-06-22 (English)
item.description:
特別編。アメリカと日本のウェルネス産業を、市場規模・規制・消費者トレンド・トレンドの時差・構造差の5角度で比較。結論は「全く別物ではなく、規制の骨格はむしろ酷似。違いを生むのは国民皆保険という土台で、似ているが制度差と時差を内包した市場」。米ウェルネス全体は約2.1兆ドルで日本の関連市場とは一桁差、規制は日米とも非事前審査の届出制で同型、皆保険がセルフケア市場を抑制、Wegovyの例が時差と抑制の二面性を示す。「日本は数年遅れで米国を後追い」仮説は反証され、チャネルは日米で逆走（米EC伸長／日本店頭回帰）。
Sources: - Global Wellness Institute（米ウェルネス2.1兆ドル）: https://globalwellnessinstitute.org/press-room/press-releases/us-wellness-economy-surges-to-2-1-trillion-cementing-global-leadership/ - Nutraceuticals World / NBJ（米サプリ693億ドル・EC23.2%）: https://www.nutraceuticalsworld.com/exclusives/the-state-of-supplements-u-s-market-approaches-70-billion/ - 矢野経済研究所（日本健康食品市場・チャネル）: https://www.yano.co.jp/press-release/show/press_id/3760 - 富士経済（機能性表示食品7,274億円）: https://www.fuji-keizai.co.jp/press/detail.html?cid=25021 - FDA 構造機能表示（21 CFR 101.93）: https://www.fda.gov/food/nutrition-food-labeling-and-critical-foods/structurefunction-claims - 消費者庁 機能性表示食品: https://www.caa.go.jp/policies/policy/food_labeling/foods_with_function_claims - 日米制度比較（査読 PMC9866933）: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC9866933/ - 皆保険とセルフメディケーション（ニッセイ基礎研）: https://www.nli-research.co.jp/files/topics/35600_ext_18_0.pdf - 受診行動（査読 PMC3523005）: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3523005/ - Wegovy日米比較（Diabetes Obes Metab, Hakariya 2024）: https://dom-pubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/dom.15638

item.title: デイリーブリーフ 6/21 — 腸×健康／日米スタートアップ／最新AI
item.description: こんにちは。デイリーブリーフ、2026年6月21日の回です。今日は五つの話題をお届けします。主役は、腸と健康のサイエンス、そして腸活スタートアップの日米の動き。続いて、最新テクノロジー、お茶業界、アマゾンの最新情報を軽めに添えます。それでは始めましょう。 最初は今日の主役、腸と脳の科学です。いま注目を集めているのが、サイコバイオティクス、つまり心の状態に働きかける善玉菌という考え方です。背景には、腸と脳が双方向に信号をやり取りしているという理解があります。たとえば、体内のセロトニンのおよそ九割五分は、実は腸でつくられています。腸内の細菌は、このセロトニンに加えて、気持ちを落ち着かせるギャバや、

item.title: Daily Brief Jun 21 (English) — Gut health, startups, latest AI
item.description: Hello, and welcome to your Daily Brief for June twenty-first, twenty twenty-six. Today we have five stories. The headliners are the science of the gut and health, and the moves shaping gut-health startups in Japan and the United States. After that, we'll add lighter notes on the latest technology, t
